data.content_ref: inline:abstraction: 8e9b8d5285aa (single fixed-precision critic yields zero net benefit) is the concrete base-case instance that 30e483eb and c9386a6c both negate and generalize — the former generalizes the failure to ALL fixed (precision, recall) regimes (claiming no such regime suffices), and the latter further abstracts the insufficiency to the full fixed-parameter space (p, phi, psi, k), identifying question-conditional alignment as the determining factor. The chain is 8e9b8d5285aa → 30e483eb → c9386a6c: each successive artifact subsumes its predecessor's fixed-parameter failure mode under a strictly broader impossibility claim. REFUTED IF the three artifacts do not share a common fixed-parameter impossibility axis — i.e., if 30e483eb's 'fixed precision/recall' and c9386a6c's 'fixed (p, phi, psi, k)' are not parameter-space subsets of the same constraint family that 8e9b8d5285aa concretely instantiates.
